/usr/bin/cc  -Wall -O2 CMakeFiles/open-pipe-media-player.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/open-pipe-media-player.dir/src/app.c.o CMakeFiles/open-pipe-media-player.dir/src/player.c.o CMakeFiles/open-pipe-media-player.dir/src/pipeline.c.o CMakeFiles/open-pipe-media-player.dir/src/ui.c.o -o open-pipe-media-player  -lpthread -lgstreamer-1.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lgtk-3 -lgdk-3 -lpangocairo-1.0 -lpango-1.0 -lharfbuzz -latk-1.0 -lcairo-gobject -lcairo -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lgtk-3 -lgdk-3 -lpangocairo-1.0 -lpango-1.0 -lharfbuzz -latk-1.0 -lcairo-gobject -lcairo -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -lgio-2.0
